channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Metal manhole cover broken, 29th April
item.description:
Big crack, dropped two inches. Dangerous

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 27-35, Battersea Bridge Road, Battersea, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rotting tree branch, 29th April
item.description:
A lower branch of the tree closest to the signage board (the Alexandra Road entrance) is showing significant signs of decay and may require attention, particularly as it hangs over the entrance pathway to the play area.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Maitland Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street rubbish, 29th April
item.description:
Rubbish dumped every day by Lorrie’s visitors attending the various industrial units opposite the woods
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sandy Lane, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree on pavement branch fallen off, 29th April
item.description:
Please can the branch be removed off pavement? Thank you!

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Valley Road, Shortlands
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti, 29th April
item.description:
Graffiti on front wall No Jews Muslims stop killing On either side of door
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2, Bassano Street, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Racist graffiti on service box, 29th April
item.description:
Please remove within 24 hours. Some people have no respect. Many thanks

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 125, Cotmandene Crescent, St Paul's Cray, Orpington, Greater London

item.title: Flytipped bed, 29th April
item.description:
Please check and clear. Many thanks
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Ockham Drive, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Trees need to be remove, 29th April
item.description:
Every time kids play football here they are dimension my fence it cost me x amount already to fix the one that the kids damaged I would like to see the tree removed

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Ravensworth Road, Mottingham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped vehicle, 29th April
item.description:
Dumped Vehicle no tax or mot
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 10, Letchworth Drive, Hayes, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: No cctv on penfold lane, 29th April
item.description:
The Police tell me that there is no CCTV monitoring this public footpath lane used by commuters, day and night. This lane is dimly lit in the dark evenings and night and is an open invitation to predators and muggers. As a woman walking home via this lane after a night out in London this has always been a fear. CCTV should be installed by Bexley Council. C'mon Cllr. David Leaf - yourMission Statement states 'we are investing in a new CCTV system to tackle crime, keeping our community safe' ......DO IT !
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1-4, Penfold Lane, Albany Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken post bollard uneven footpath, 29th April
item.description:
Broken post on road corner of Lord Warwick and Frances Street

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Frances Street, Woolwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Roadworks blocking pavement, 29th April
item.description:
The roadworks created by Thames Water are blocking the pavement and there is now a large pot hole causing a danger to pedestrians

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Allendale Close, Perry Vale
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Glass on road, 29th April
item.description:
Huge pile of broken glass on cycle route

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Larkhall Rise, Clapham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Furniture and other rubbish on Grace's Rd, 29th April
item.description:
Doesn't appear to be a bulky waste collection and is attracting other rubbish.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Graces Road, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: The path we use in between where cars park, 29th April
item.description:
We are now tripping up as the potholes are getting bigger they are filling up with water and between where we park which is used as the exit from Hither Farm Road, they have been getting bigger over last 10 months

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Hither Farm Road, Kidbrooke
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree is causing a nuisance where its overhanging the whole road and my car keeps getting covered in bird poo which is becoming very hard to get off and causing me a lot of stress, 29th April
item.description:
The tree opposite my address at 67 Amherst Drive is causing a lot of issues with one of our cars being covered daily in bird poo which is not good for the paint work on my car! It is parked on the road as our driveway is only big enough for 2 cars and it is causing me a lot of stress having to wash it almost everyday when i work full time! And we are therefore having to use a lot of extra water to remove it. We have had this issue in the past and we went back and forth with the council for a couple of years before they actually came out the cut the tree back. Also a month of so ago we noticed that some arborists were cutting back a fair few amount of trees on this same stretch of woods and when my mum asked them if they could cut back this tree, she was told that they were only contracted to the ones they were doing, so it would be great if you could get someone out to sort this issue. Thanks

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 67, Amherst Drive, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Obscene graffiti in children’s playground, 29th April
item.description:
Goose Green playground. Please remove asap.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): East Dulwich Road, East Dulwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Signage repair, 29th April
item.description:
The park signage panel (Alexandra Road entrance) has become detached from the board and requires repair.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Maitland Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Basket with items including glass outside 13, 29th April
item.description:
Has been there for 1 week. No one came to pick anything from the basket and it was last in the middle of the street outside 13. Another fly tipping by 13B!
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Belvoir Road, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 7-8 cars, 29th April
item.description:
A towing vehicle is being used by the same individuals to deliver and rotate 6–7 vehicles every 2 days on Montagu Road. This has been ongoing for over a month and appears to be an unauthorised car trading/storage operation using a public road. This is affecting my business and causing a nuisance.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Montagu Road, Edmonton
Report on FixMyStreet
